title: Add lichen_hash_32 FNV-1a32 helper matching test/vectors/hash_32.json and Rust impl
description: Implement uint32_t lichen_hash_32(const uint8_t* data, size_t len) with basis 0x811c9dc5, prime 0x01000193. Add to lichen/subsys/lichen/l2/lichen_util.h and .c or link/util. Verify with vectors. No_std compatible, no dead code.
close_reason: Implemented lichen_hash_32 FNV-1a32 in lichen_util matching test vectors and Rust; added verification test in util test; committed and pushed
